channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-19T20:52Z — 1100 outages, 31,698 customers, 634 fair-weather, 9 DC-proximate
item.description: NC-DEC: 1512 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | BGE: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | PA-NY: 981 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY) | PA-NY: 874 cust (WEATHER-LIKELY)

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
